description: Versioned schema contract for audit/ui/ui_pairs.csv. Required columns are stable and guaranteed on every run. Optional columns are present only when the corresponding extra_fields are configured and available in matched_pairs.

notes.ui_contract_version: Schema version string. Always 'v1' for this contract. Increment to v2 when required_columns change.
notes.pair_id: Unique identifier for the matched employee pair (e.g. P-00001).
notes.match_source: Strategy used to match the pair: worker_id, recon_id, pk, last4_dob, dob_name, name_hire_date.
notes.old_worker_id: Employee identifier in the legacy (source) HRIS system.
notes.new_worker_id: Employee identifier in the new (target) HRIS system.
notes.fix_types: Pipe-separated list of detected mismatch categories (e.g. 'salary|hire_date'). Empty string if no changes.
notes.action: Gating decision: APPROVE (within confidence thresholds) or REVIEW (human review required).
notes.reason: Human-readable explanation of the action decision.
notes.confidence: Match confidence score in [0,1]. Blank for auto-approve sources (worker_id).
notes.min_confidence: Minimum required confidence threshold across all detected fix_types. Blank if auto-approved.
notes.priority_score: Integer priority score for review queue ordering. Higher = more urgent.
notes.summary: Concise plain-English summary of all detected mismatches.
notes.has_salary_mismatch: Boolean — true if salary differs between old and new system.
notes.has_payrate_mismatch: Boolean — true if pay rate differs.
notes.has_status_mismatch: Boolean — true if worker status differs.
notes.has_hire_date_mismatch: Boolean — true if hire date differs.
notes.has_job_org_mismatch: Boolean — true if any job/org field differs (position, district, location_state).
notes.salary_delta: new_salary minus old_salary. Blank if either side is non-numeric.
notes.payrate_delta: new_payrate minus old_payrate. Blank if either side is non-numeric.
notes.old_salary: Annual base salary in the legacy system.
notes.new_salary: Annual base salary in the new system.
notes.old_payrate: Periodic pay rate in the legacy system.
notes.new_payrate: Periodic pay rate in the new system.
notes.old_worker_status: Worker status in the legacy system (Active, Inactive, Leave, etc.).
notes.new_worker_status: Worker status in the new system.
notes.old_hire_date: Hire date in the legacy system (YYYY-MM-DD preferred).
notes.new_hire_date: Hire date in the new system.
notes.old_position: Job title or position in the legacy system.
notes.new_position: Job title or position in the new system.
notes.old_district: District or cost-center grouping in the legacy system.
notes.new_district: District or cost-center grouping in the new system.
notes.old_location_state: Location state or region in the legacy system.
notes.new_location_state: Location state or region in the new system.
notes.old_location: Full location string in the legacy system. Blank if not present in DB.
notes.new_location: Full location string in the new system. Blank if not present in DB.
notes.old_worker_type: Worker type (Full-time, Part-time, Contractor, etc.) in the legacy system. Blank if not in DB.
notes.new_worker_type: Worker type in the new system. Blank if not in DB.
notes.old_cost_center: [optional] Cost center in the legacy system. Present only if configured in extra_fields.
notes.new_cost_center: [optional] Cost center in the new system.
notes.mm_cost_center: [optional] Boolean — true if cost_center differs between old and new.
notes.old_company: [optional] Legal entity / company in the legacy system.
notes.new_company: [optional] Legal entity / company in the new system.
notes.old_department: [optional] Department name in the legacy system.
notes.new_department: [optional] Department name in the new system.
notes.old_business_unit: [optional] Business unit in the legacy system.
notes.new_business_unit: [optional] Business unit in the new system.
